text: The sterile quiet of the glass-walled hallway makes me feel a sense of anticipation, as though on the threshold of discovery. Entering the vivid, idea-laden exhibition space, I feel intellectually alive but also small—surrounded by innovation and the persistent question of what it means to be human among machines. My mind drifts between curiosity and self-reflection, sensing a silent kinship with the other seekers who have entered this space before me.
